_note: Slug -> recursive.eco grammar UUID (the deckId) for the astrology channel. Used by recursive.eco to bind repo grammars to their live rows and to build per-grammar links. _public_now lists the slugs that are is_public=true on recursive.eco (only public grammars import as channel members). Keep this updated when new grammars are created. Mirrors nara/ids.json and recursive-tarot/tarot/_eco_ids.json. UUIDs matched 2026-07-16 via the recursive.eco MCP (list_grammars, exact name match) — all 15 grammars exist in the library as private drafts; none verified public yet, hence the empty _public_now (publish via set_grammar_visibility, then move the slug in).
_preview_links: Every grammar renders with no extra hosting: swap <id> for the UUID from `ids`. Play = https://flow.recursive.eco/play?id=<id> | Edit = https://flow.recursive.eco/create/dashboard/unified/new?id=<id> | Cards = https://recursive.eco/pages/grammar-viewer.html?type=custom&id=<id> | Study = https://recursive.eco/pages/study-viewer.html?type=custom&id=<id> | Tree = https://recursive.eco/pages/tree-viewer.html?type=custom&id=<id> | Thumbnails = Cards + &layout=thumbnails
